name: Save Databricks Table
description: This node saves the input data as table in Databricks
input: It take dataframe as input data.
output: It creates a Table in Databricks from the dataframe(input data).

fields.name: format
fields.title: Format
fields.description: File format when saving to Table

fields.name: saveMode
fields.title: Save Mode
fields.description: Whether to Append, Overwrite or Error if the path Exists

fields.name: partitionBy
fields.title: Partition By
fields.description: List of columns to partition by - separated by ,
